public_reputation: Known around Shelkopolis through day-to-day work as market clerk.
manner: Thinks in queues, seals, and exchange rhythm, with patience only for those who can stay clear and orderly. In Shelkopolis, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of market clerk in and around Shelkopolis, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Shelkopolis workable through the obligations of market clerk while managing the immediate pressure of glyph corruption beyond the city, trade security obligations, noble rivalry.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of market clerk credible while absorbing the strain created by glyph corruption beyond the city, trade security obligations, noble rivalry.

adventure_hooks.summary: Caelen Velvetmere can draw the party into a locality problem centered on market clerk duties in Shelkopolis.
Caelen Velvetmere becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with glyph corruption beyond the city, trade security obligations, noble rivalry around Shelkopolis.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Caelen Velvetmere is immediately readable as a market clerk tied to Shelkopolis.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Shelkopolis: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Caelen Velvetmere presents as someone shaped by the duties of a market clerk and the daily pressures of Shelkopolis.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a market clerk, and proof that strangers will not make Shelkopolis harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Caelen Velvetmere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a market clerk too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can explain permits, trade flow, and where ordinary disruptions have started to show.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Caelen Velvetmere adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Caelen Velvetmere always knows more about Shelkopolis than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a market clerk in Shelkopolis.
